aliases: Pro-X 8MP AI ISP Fixed Turret Network Camera

storage.notes: microSD capacity not confirmed for this model.

features: F1.0 large aperture for full-color 24/7 imaging without IR
VCA (video content analytics), MD 2.0 human/vehicle detection
part of LTS's newer Pro-X line, designed in the US with a 5-year manufacturer warranty per LTS marketing
release_notes: Pro-X is LTS's newer, higher-end product line (separate from the longer-running Platinum series). LTS markets Pro-X as NDAA-compliant. Underlying chipset/OEM origin for Pro-X was not confirmed in the sources reviewed — unlike Platinum (confirmed Hikvision OEM), do not assume the same firmware conventions apply without verification.

frigate.notes: RTSP path and ONVIF profile not confirmed for the Pro-X line specifically — do not assume the Platinum/Hikvision-style channel path applies without verification, since Pro-X's OEM origin is unconfirmed.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF support not independently confirmed for this specific model.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
